en: In this lesson we look at the idiom to be alive and kicking.
ko: 이번 수업에서는 alive and kicking이라는 관용구를 살펴봅니다.

en: This means to be healthy and well.
For example, my grandmother is 92 years old, but she is alive and kicking.
This means that although she is old, she is still well and healthy.
ko: 이것은 비록 나이가 드셨지만 여전히 건강하시다는 뜻입니다.
